title: scaphium linearicarpum
intro: Scaphium linearicarpum, a species of plant in the family Apocynaceae, is commonly known as the "linear-fruited scaphium" or " Malayan cat's claw". It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In traditional medicine, Scaphium linearicarpum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations like tinctures and ointments.
